title: Suggestion Set
description: The paste-back contract for the FREE manual-Grok suggestion path (the setup automations). Rather than spend on an LLM API, the operator runs a shipped prompt (templates/grok-prompts/) on their own Grok/X account and pastes the result back; the engine parses THIS shape out of the pasted text (a fenced ```oce-suggestions block) and turns it into PROPOSALS the operator confirms. Suggestions are advisory — competitors / tracked accounts / keywords are added to config only on an explicit operator confirm, never auto-applied. Everything here is Zone-U external text (an LLM produced it); it is treated as untrusted and only configures tracking/analysis targets, never rules. Spec ref: release-spec §1.2 competitor identification; §8.8 trend tracking.

kind.description: Which suggestion task produced this set.

brand.description: Optional brand id the suggestions are for (competitor sets are brand-scoped).

generated_at.description: Optional ISO date the operator ran the prompt.

note.description: Optional free-text note from the model run (context, caveats).

items.description: The suggested items. A handle-bearing item (competitors / tracked_accounts / a breakout account) carries `handle`; a keyword item (keywords / a breakout keyword) carries `term`. The parser requires each item to carry at least one of handle/term.

handle.description: An account handle (with or without a leading @).

term.description: A keyword or hashtag to track.

name.description: Optional human-readable name for the account/brand.

why.description: Optional one-line rationale the model gave (why this is relevant).

signal.description: Optional breakout/trend signal note (for the monthly breakout-discovery set).
